message:
Running command: 
# 4h54m CPU / ~80.3min elapsed. 3rd iter at 90% (computing 90-100%).
# Should complete in ~2 more minutes. Then 4th iteration starts rapidly.
# Continue monitoring.

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 60
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break

    dd if=/proc/1100961/fd/11 bs=131072 count=256 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 8; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -3 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT71=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEPS=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -2 | tr '\n' ',')
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B ODB=$DRT71 FINAL=$FINAL STEPS=$STEPS | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
